title: PCR of mouse LOXP (Cleavage Template)
steps: Prepare PCR mix by adding 50μl of H2O, 16μl of GC Buffer, 1.6μl of dNTPs, 4μl of 10μM LOX fwd (57.3℃) primer, 4μl of 10μM LOX rev (55.9℃) primer, and 200ng of LOXP DNA (target DNA).

Prior to adding Phusion, set up thermocycler protocol: 95℃ 5mins, [95℃ 30sec (Denaturation), 56℃ 30sec (Annealing), 72℃ 30sec (Elongation)] x 30, 72℃ 5mins, 4℃ on hold. Add Phusion 0.8μl into PCR mix and mix thoroughly (pipette up and down), and divide the mix into 20μl or 40μl per tube. Place tubes in the thermocycler and run thermocycler protocol.
Prepare 15% gel by adding 600mg of agorose into 40ml 1xTB Buffer. Heat mixture in microwave for 1.5 min and add 4μl cybersafe. Insert two small combs and pour gel mixture. Let gel cool and solidify.
Load 2μl 1kb ladder with 2μl 6xLD in first well. Load 2μl of the sample from each tube with 2μl of 6xLD. Load total 4μl into well. Run gel on 80V for 40 mins. See whether the PCR is successful.
creator: Jing-Yi Chung
